title: New Domain for Transactional Emails
goal: Migrate transactional email domains for Emporium and Staff Shopping to the new avoltashopping.com domain for improved deliverability and brand consistency.
description: Transactional email addresses for Emporium and Staff Shopping are being updated to use the new @orders.avoltashopping.com domain. This includes EMEA, UK, Americas, and APAC regions. For example, Emporium EMEA moves from emporium.support@avolta.net to emporium.support@orders.avoltashopping.com. Staff Shopping domains are similarly updated across all regions.
